speaker: speaker2
text: I haven't played chess for a long time .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's all right , I'm a beginner . I've just learnt how to play .

speaker: speaker2
text: Look , there's a chessboard . Those two men have already finished playing .

speaker: speaker2
text: Not really , but once I won a prize .

speaker: speaker1
text: So did I . I won a prize last week but it was a prize for beginners .

speaker: speaker2
text: My prize was for the best player in the country . Now let's start playing chess seriously .
